notes: Generated after intake because the CSV was supplied without a sidecar.
The CSV is treated as manual_user_input source evidence; pipeline rows hash the CSV/provenance pair rather than missing source image files.
source_image values are source labels from the supplied CSV. Files IMG_8055.jpg through IMG_8111.jpg were not present in the repository at sidecar creation time.
Venue and schedule URLs are not inferred; canonical fixture file cites this manual odds CSV as fixture evidence.
operator_notes: Manual Betsson/Betano odds update for June 30 and July 1, 2026 fixtures, including standard and promo market rows where supplied.
required_minimum: complete 1X2 rows per fixture/app where supplied; additional markets retained only when normalized and complete enough for the relevant market-family check
warnings: No source image files for IMG_8055.jpg through IMG_8111.jpg were found under Screenshots/ during validation.
Rows include abbreviated duplicate fixture IDs; canonical mapping is performed by fixture_display/team identity.
Rows captured at or after canonical kickoff are preserved in this raw source file but excluded from the normalized evaluation odds artifact.
